statusLine.command: input=$(cat); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // "Claude"'); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // ""' | xargs basename 2>/dev/null); branch=$(git -C "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // "."')" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); parts=""; [ -n "$remaining" ] && parts="ctx:${remaining%.*}%"; parts="${parts:+$parts | }$model"; [ -n "$branch" ] && parts="$parts | git:$branch"; [ -n "$dir" ] && parts="$parts | $dir"; echo "$parts"
